trigger_definition: Average monthly returns during months when Fidelity World A-ACC-SGD was in its worst decile (-4.75% or lower).
economic_proxy_interpretation: Proxy for a negative earnings-growth and risk-appetite state.

trigger_definition: Average monthly returns during months when United High Grade Corporate Bond A Acc SGD was in its worst decile (-1.16% or lower).
economic_proxy_interpretation: Proxy for a discount-rate shock that hurts duration-sensitive assets.

trigger_definition: Average monthly returns during the top 6 months ranked by high Blackrock World Gold Fund A2 SGD-H performance and weak United High Grade Corporate Bond A Acc SGD performance after the quartile intersection produced fewer than 6 observations.
economic_proxy_interpretation: Proxy for a state in which nominal bonds weaken while real-asset hedges strengthen.
